name: ActionLink
description: A styled link component with theme color support for navigation and actions, supporting both internal routing and external links.
usage_guidelines: Use for text links that trigger navigation or actions.
Use 'to' prop for internal React Router navigation.
Set themeColor to false for custom styling.
Use reloadDocument for full page reloads.

themeColor.description: Applies primary theme color to link.

to.description: Internal route path for React Router navigation.

href.description: External URL for standard anchor links.

reloadDocument.description: Forces full page reload on navigation.

styling_info.visual_description: A text link with primary color (when themeColor is true) and underline on hover. Inherits text styling from parent.

Dont: Don't use for primary actions (use Button instead)
Don't forget accessibility attributes for external links

Basic.title: Basic

Hyperlink.title: Hyperlink

ThemeColor.title: Theme Color
